findings.item: Emit one canonical turn-boundary event stream
findings.issue: Line 1492 is `self._session.emit("metrics_collected", MetricsCollectedEvent(metrics=ev))` — a per-turn metrics emission, not the named turn-boundary events (UserStartedSpeaking / AgentThinking / AgentStartedSpeaking) the item enumerates. In the LiveKit clone those named boundary events are emitted as `user_state_changed` / `agent_state_changed` from agent_session.py (and user_input_transcribed at agent_session.py:1639). The pipecat co-citation (user_bot_latency_observer.py:205, which tracks VADUserStartedSpeaking/UserStoppedSpeaking/BotStartedSpeaking frames) does support the claim, so the item stands; the livekit anchor is imprecise.
findings.correct: For named boundary events use _clones/agents/livekit-agents/livekit/agents/voice/agent_session.py (user_state_changed / agent_state_changed emits, e.g. user_input_transcribed at :1639); 1492 is a metrics_collected emit, not a boundary-event anchor.

summary: Verified all 7 Observability items and 14 code/source citations. OBS-02 (agent_activity.py:2768-2771 e2e_latency=started_speaking_at-stopped_speaking_at; pipecat:292), OBS-05 (metrics/base.py:94-105 EOUMetrics end_of_utterance_delay+transcription_delay; otel_metrics.py:38-47 transcription_delay+end_of_turn_delay histograms), OBS-04 (base.py:20-81 LLM/STT/TTS metrics with request_id/speech_id/segment_id; otel_metrics.py:23-47 per-turn histograms), OBS-03/TURN-11 (base.py:166-175 InterruptionMetrics num_interruptions+num_backchannels), OBS-09 (audio_recognition.py:1185 'VAD unreliable' refuse-to-compute), and OBS-10 (base.py:115-157 RealtimeModelMetrics) all confirmed at or within a few lines of cited locations. Source-only flags verified: VAQI aggregate absent from clones (grep 'vaqi' -> 0 matches), synthetic/RUM harness absent (grep -> 0 matches). All note refs (OBS-01..10, LAT-01, TURN-11) exist in notes/. Only a MINOR citation-precision issue on OBS-01's livekit anchor.
